name: Chocolate Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the oats and coconut.
2. In a large pot, combine the butter, milk, sugar, vanilla, a pinch of salt, and cocoa. Mix well and bring to a low boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from the stove and stir in the oats and coconut mixture.
4. Using a large spoon, shape cookies on an oiled baking sheet. Allow to cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Note: These taste great fresh out of the oven but do not keep well over time.
